description: The official eCash account — announcements, fork updates, and everything happening on ecash.com.
Paul Sztorc's personal account — Bitcoin criticism, drivechain research, and the eCash thesis.
LayerTwo Labs team — dev updates, signet milestones, and protocol announcements.
Official eCash announcement channel — important updates, releases, and fork milestones.
The eCash community hangout — casual discussion, questions, and connecting with other supporters.
The main Drivechain community — BIP-300 discussion, ecosystem building, and technical debate.
Paul's personal Telegram — longer-form commentary and direct updates from the founder.
Interviews, explainer videos, a decade of Drivechain talks, and recorded debates.
Open-source home of the eCash node, BitWindow, Thunder, zSide, and all L2 repos.
Community-run publication covering the eCash thesis, Drivechain philosophy, and fork analysis. Not affiliated with LayerTwo Labs.
